description_long: This is a women's wedge sandal featuring a high, solid wedge heel and a wide, textured fabric upper in a light beige color. The sandal has an open toe and an open back, with a single broad strap crossing the front and a cutout design on the sides for added style and breathability. The insole is tan with visible stitching around the edge and the brand name 'Lacoste' printed in gold lettering. The outsole appears to be black and slightly textured for grip. The overall design is modern and elegant, suitable for casual or semi-formal urban settings.
description: A high wedge-heeled sandal with a light beige textured fabric upper, open toe, and Lacoste branding on the insole.
description_view_0: Front view shows the open toe, wide strap, and Lacoste branding on the insole.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the high wedge heel, side cutout, and textured fabric upper.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full height and width of the wedge heel and the backless design.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the wedge heel, side cutout, and fabric texture.
attribute_logo: Gold 'Lacoste' text on the insole near the heel area
